heading: Operative effect dependent upon Presidential finding
label: 706 Operative effect dependent upon Presidential finding
text: This chapter shall be operative with respect to the military, naval, or air forces of any foreign state only after a finding and declaration by the President that the powers and privileges provided herein are necessary for the maintenance of discipline. The President may at any time revoke such finding and declaration.
notes: Proclamation No. 2626Proc. No. 2626, , 9 F.R. 12403, respecting activation by President, was revoked by Proc. No. 3107, , 20 F.R. 5805.Oct. 12, 1944Aug. 9, 1955
